name: 7-factor-mcp
title: 7-factor-mcp
summary: Audit MCP servers and clients for tool boundaries, schema clarity, permissions, safety, observability, runtime behavior, and integration quality.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 7-factor-mcp skill to review this MCP server for tool boundaries, schema clarity, permission design, safety, and integration quality.
review_protocol: Identify project type and user-facing goal.
Inspect relevant files and infer missing context conservatively.
Run available validation commands or record why they could not run.
